title: NExon test dataset
author: Margasyuk, Sergey
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Test data for the NExon pipeline.   Contains data for chromosome 20 from an RNA sequencing of the A549 cell line treated with cycloheximide.   The archive contains BAM files and pyIPSA J6 output files for two sequencing experiments, and the required annotation files.
steps_raw: Test data for the NExon pipeline.   Contains data for chromosome 20 from an RNA sequencing of the A549 cell line treated with cycloheximide.   The archive contains BAM files and pyIPSA J6 output files for two sequencing experiments, and the required annotation files.
